ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(ISPICKVAL(CONTAINER_Quote_Number__r.ApprovalStatus__c , 'Pending'), OR( ISCHANGED( CONTAINER_Qty__c ), ISCHANGED( CONTAINER_Week_Of__c ),ISCHANGED( CONTAINER_Ship_To_Destination__c ),ISCHANGED( CONTAINER_Account__c )))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You need to recall approval to make changes.
